Availability ⚡

Same-week installs available

Our schedule fills fast — especially heading into heating season. Book your free estimate today to lock your spot. Most installs are finished in one day.

Comfort 🌡️

Room-by-room control — finally

Unlike window units or central A/C, mini splits let each room have its own temperature. Bedroom stays cool. Living room stays comfortable. No arguments, no compromises.

Air Quality 💨

Filters air and kills humidity

Mini splits filter allergens, dust, and humidity as they cool. Boston summers are sticky — this actually fixes it. No more waking up damp. No more musty air from a window unit drip pan.

Efficiency ⚡

3× more efficient than window A/C

A properly sized mini split uses dramatically less electricity than the equivalent number of window units — and it heats your home in winter too. One system. Year-round comfort.

🛢️ Oil Heat · Newton, MA
The Robinsons ditched oil after 28 years. Their first winter bill was $0.
Old monthly cost
$390
New payment
$145/mo
System installed
LG 3-Zone
Cold Climate

💚 Net monthly saving: $245 · MassSave rebate: $7,200
The Robinson family in Newton had been on heating oil since they bought their 1,900 sq ft colonial in 1996. Every fall, the same anxiety — how high would oil go this year? In the winter of 2022, they paid over $4,600 in fuel. That's when they called HeatSmarter Home Services.The Robinsons had endured 26 New England summers without central A/C — fans, open windows, and one struggling window unit in the bedroom. When they called HeatSmarter Home Services about replacing their oil heat, they discovered the same LG 3-zone system would cool their entire home too.
Read the full story →
+

After a free in-home assessment, HeatSmarter Home Services installed a LG 3-zone cold-climate heat pump system — one outdoor unit powering three indoor mini splits across the first and second floors. The entire install was completed in a single day.

The result: their heating oil bill dropped to exactly $0. Their electric bill increased by about $95/month in winter, but with the LG system also handling summer cooling, they eliminated their window A/C units too — saving another $40/month in electricity during summer.

The Robinsons also qualified for a $7,200 MassSave rebate, which reduced their financed amount significantly. Their monthly financing payment came in at $145 — nearly $250 less than their average oil spend.

"I wish we'd done this ten years ago," said Michael Robinson. "The house is more comfortable than it's ever been, and I don't spend a single minute worrying about fuel prices."

Sound familiar? Your home could look just like this.

💚 Net monthly saving: $85 · Added full A/C for first time · Gas bill eliminated
The Garcias bought their Somerville triple-decker in 2010. Gas heat worked fine — until it didn't. By 2024 their bill had climbed from $160/month to over $240, and they still had no air conditioning. Every summer meant window units, extension cords, and high electric bills.Every May it was the same routine for the Garcias — drag out the window units, block the light, deal with the noise and dripping. 14 summers of it. When HeatSmarter installed their GREE 2-zone mini split, the window units went to the curb that same afternoon.
Read the full story →
+

When Carlos Garcia called HeatSmarter Home Services, he was primarily trying to solve the A/C problem. HeatSmarter Home Services installed a GREE 2-zone mini split system that replaced his aging gas furnace entirely — at a monthly payment lower than his current gas bill.

The install covered the open-plan first floor and the primary bedroom on the second floor. Because their triple-decker had no ductwork, the mini split system was a perfect fit — no walls opened, no mess, no structural work required. Done in one day.

Their gas bill went to zero. Their financing payment came in at $155/month — $85 less than what they'd been paying for gas heat alone. The window units went to the curb. Summer electricity costs dropped by over $60/month.

"We kept asking when the catch was," said Maria Garcia. "There wasn't one. The payment is less, the house is cooler in summer, warmer in winter, and we never have to think about the gas company again."

On gas with no A/C? This is your story too.

The #1 Question

Does a heat pump actually work in a Boston winter?

Yes. LG and GREE cold-climate systems are engineered to operate efficiently down to -13°F. Boston's coldest nights rarely hit -10°F. Hundreds of Greater Boston homeowners have already made the switch with zero backup heat.

-13°F
Operating temperatureLG & GREE cold-climate systems keep running in Boston's worst winters
3×
More efficient than oil or gasHeat pumps move heat instead of creating it — 3× less energy used
500+
Boston homes already switchedHeatSmarter installs across Greater Boston — zero backup heat needed
The Top Questions

Everything you want to know about mini split cooling.

Real answers for Boston homeowners considering the switch from window units or no A/C.

Can my heat pump also cool my home efficiently?
+
Yes — and more efficiently than almost anything else. The same mini split that heats your home in winter runs in reverse in summer to cool it. LG and GREE systems operate at a SEER2 rating of 20+, which is roughly 3× more efficient than a standard window unit. You get precise temperature control in every room, with no window blocked and no noise.
Will it replace my window A/C units completely?
+
Yes, completely. One wall-mounted indoor unit per room or zone replaces all window units in that space. No more installing them every May, removing them every October, storing them all winter, or tolerating the noise and dripping. Most Boston homes are done in a single day with zero ductwork required.
How does mini split cooling compare to central A/C?
+
Mini splits are more efficient, easier to install in older Boston homes (no ductwork needed), and give you room-by-room control that central A/C can't match. Central A/C cools everything to one temperature — mini splits let each zone be exactly where you want it. They also filter and dehumidify the air as they cool, which matters in a Boston summer.
SEER2 20+
Cooling efficiency rating3× more efficient than standard window units
1 Day
Typical install timeNo ductwork. Clean job. Done fast.
Year-round
One system, both seasonsHeats in winter, cools in summer — same unit

FAQ

Quick answers.

The questions Boston homeowners ask before they call.

Does a heat pump work in Boston winters?
+
Yes. LG and GREE cold-climate models work down to -13°F. Boston's coldest nights rarely hit -10°F. Hundreds of local homeowners have ditched oil and gas with zero backup heat needed.
What will my actual monthly payment be?
+
Most Greater Boston customers finance between $120–$190/month. Subtract eliminated fuel costs and the net change is often near zero or positive. We show you the exact numbers during the free estimate — no guesswork.
I'm on gas — is it still worth switching?
+
For most Boston-area gas customers, yes — especially without A/C or with an aging furnace. Gas rates in New England are up 35%+ since 2020. A heat pump eliminates your gas bill and adds cooling at a payment that's often comparable to what you pay now.
Will my price change after the estimate?
+
No. Written estimates are built around your actual home. We walk through every line before you sign. No bait and switch, ever.
Do I need to keep my old system as backup?
+
For most homes, no. A properly sized cold-climate LG or GREE heat pump handles Boston winters on its own. We assess your home's heat load first and tell you honestly if there's any edge case.
